title: Surgeon Vacancy at Alkem Laboratories Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Alkem Laboratories Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Alkem Laboratories Capital India are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Alkem Laboratories Capital India:
Alkem Laboratories Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories Capital India!
